tasks.subject: Define the core schema
tasks.description: Author the Zod schema for the feature config and export the inferred types.

tasks.subject: Add the CLI validator
tasks.description: Write a dependency-free CLI that validates a config object against the committed schema.

tasks.subject: Wire the validator into the engine loop
tasks.description: Call the validator at startup and surface schema violations as actionable errors.
tasks.activeForm: Wiring the validator into the engine loop

tasks.subject: Document the config surface
tasks.description: Write CONFIG.md covering every field, its default, and its allowed values.
